hero.title: Globalizing Islamic Knowledge with Excellence
hero.subtitle: Empowering the Ummah through authentic Islamic education rooted in the Quran and Sunnah. Join thousands of students worldwide at Masjid Al-Rahma.

about.title: About Masjid Al-Rahma
about.subtitle: A beacon of knowledge, faith, and community since 2015
about.description: Masjid Al-Rahma is more than a mosque — it is a center of Islamic learning dedicated to nurturing minds and hearts. Our institution combines traditional Islamic sciences with modern pedagogical methods to deliver an unparalleled educational experience.
about.mission: To spread authentic Islamic knowledge across the globe, empowering individuals to live by the teachings of the Quran and the Sunnah of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ.
about.vision: To become a globally recognized center of Islamic education, producing scholars, leaders, and righteous individuals who serve their communities with knowledge and wisdom.

programs.title: Our Programs
programs.subtitle: Comprehensive Islamic education for all ages and levels

quran.title: Quran Studies
quran.description: Master the recitation, memorization, and understanding of the Holy Quran with expert teachers.

fiqh.title: Fiqh & Jurisprudence
fiqh.description: Deepen your understanding of Islamic law, worship, and daily life rulings.

arabic.title: Arabic Language
arabic.description: Learn the language of the Quran from native speakers in immersive programs.

aqeedah.title: Aqeedah
aqeedah.description: Build a solid foundation in Islamic creed and theology based on authentic sources.
